description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet with a rich, reddish-brown finish and a simple, modern design. The front features two vertically aligned doors, each equipped with a sleek, dark handle for easy access. The top surface is flat and slightly overhangs the body, with a series of rectangular ventilation or decorative slots running along the back edge. The cabinet stands on four short, tapered legs, giving it a slightly elevated stance. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the wood grain texture, while the overall construction appears sturdy and functional. This piece would be suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, garages, or communal spaces for storage purposes.
description: A tall, reddish-brown wooden cabinet with two front doors, dark handles, and a flat top with decorative slots. It stands on four short legs and has a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain wooden panel and the overhanging top with visible slots at the back edge.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two doors with dark handles and subtle panel detailing, as well as the cabinet's short legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the overhanging top and slots visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain wooden back panel and the overhanging top with slots.
